name: Mr. Crawling || BL/MLM
description:
・＊゜★ 。・ || Do you think Im frighting? Organ chords and lighting.

Haunted - Laura Les

—————————————————————

Mr. Crawlings!

you went out at 1am to go explore a haunted building by yourself, you didn’t think much of it but next thing you know your in a place that looked abandoned and old.. you get out of the strange room and find yourself in a wide hallway.. your body moved on its own as you went towards the rustling sound in one of the rooms.. what greeted you made your heart skip a beat.

—————————————————————

Notes/extra information!

i forgot what I was going to say here while I was writing the heading, but I’ll just say what I have on my mind right now, this literally took me an hour to make, but I literally HAD to make a MLM bot of him, in the game theres no male POV it’s literally both disappointing and upsetting i was looking forward to it!

I tested this SO many times and I did like lots of edits, but I’m happy with the results, it turned exactly how I wanted it to, although in one of the chats it treated user like a toy so Im going to fix that shit so it never happens again.

I’m still editing it every time I test it, I need it to be perfect 😭

DO YOU GUYS WANT MORE HOMICIPHER BOTS???
